blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all necessary portions.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No obstructions, such as objects or shadows, blocking document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, payment method, and item description. The presence of these fields, along with the confirmation of payment, indicates that this is an expense document. The expense type is classified as 'meals' based on the description '1 COFFEE CLUB'.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 5 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document. The fields found include supplier (Mega International Commercial Bank), transaction amount (NT$ 130), transaction date (2025/04/18 15:20:02), payment method (mastercard), and item description (1 COFFEE CLUB).

extraction.special_notes: I AGREE TO PAY TOTAL AMOUNT ACCORDING TO CARD ISSUER AGREEMENT

issues.description: Supplier address is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Name of the vendor/merchant must be visible on receipt

issues.description: Invoice number is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.

issues.description: Tax amount is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free. Expenses that fall under taxable income will be treated as per the local regulations.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free.

issues.description: Additional information required for foreign currency expenses is missing.
issues.recommendation: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing supplier address, VAT number, customer name, and invoice number. Additionally, the tax amount is missing, and there is no additional information for foreign currency expenses. These issues need to be addressed for full compliance.
